title: Enhancing Business Skills of Small-Scale Rural Entrepreneurs - A technical training note
abstract:
This technical note is intended for use by small-scale rural entrepreneurs,
business people and community-based organizations interested in
groundnut seed production and marketing and groundnut processing and
marketing. It is targeted to people with little to no formal training or experience
in small-scale business. It focuses on the establishment and management
of small scale businesses. It does not address the technical aspects of
groundnut seed production or processing. Manuals on technical aspects
of producing seed or processing groundnut may be available from other
organizations.
Two illustrative examples from a groundnut seed producer and groundnut
oil and cakes processor will be used throughout the technical note.
